<path>/Users/dstern/src/personal/opencode-relay/opencode-relay/.git/hooks/pre-commit</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: #!/bin/sh
2: 
3: if [ "$LEFTHOOK_VERBOSE" = "1" -o "$LEFTHOOK_VERBOSE" = "true" ]; then
4:   set -x
5: fi
6: 
7: if [ "$LEFTHOOK" = "0" ]; then
8:   exit 0
9: fi
10: 
11: call_lefthook()
12: {
13:   if test -n "$LEFTHOOK_BIN"
14:   then
15:     "$LEFTHOOK_BIN" "$@"
16:   elif lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
17:   then
18:     lefthook "$@"
19:   else
20:     dir="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
21:     osArch=$(uname | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
22:     cpuArch=$(uname -m | sed 's/aarch64/arm64/;s/x86_64/x64/')
23:     if test -f "$dir/node_modules/lefthook-${osArch}-${cpuArch}/bin/lefthook"
24:     then
25:       "$dir/node_modules/lefthook-${osArch}-${cpuArch}/bin/lefthook" "$@"
26:     elif test -f "$dir/node_modules/@evilmartians/lefthook/bin/lefthook-${osArch}-${cpuArch}/lefthook"
27:     then
28:       "$dir/node_modules/@evilmartians/lefthook/bin/lefthook-${osArch}-${cpuArch}/lefthook" "$@"
29:     elif test -f "$dir/node_modules/@evilmartians/lefthook-installer/bin/lefthook"
30:     then
31:       "$dir/node_modules/@evilmartians/lefthook-installer/bin/lefthook" "$@"
32:     elif test -f "$dir/node_modules/lefthook/bin/index.js"
33:     then
34:       "$dir/node_modules/lefthook/bin/index.js" "$@"
35:     
36:     elif go tool lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
37:     then
38:       go tool lefthook "$@"
39:     elif bundle exec lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
40:     then
41:       bundle exec lefthook "$@"
42:     elif yarn lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
43:     then
44:       yarn lefthook "$@"
45:     elif pnpm lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
46:     then
47:       pnpm lefthook "$@"
48:     elif swift package lefthook >/dev/null 2>&1
49:     then
50:       swift package --build-path .build/lefthook --disable-sandbox lefthook "$@"
51:     elif command -v mint >/dev/null 2>&1
52:     then
53:       mint run csjones/lefthook-plugin "$@"
54:     elif uv run lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
55:     then
56:       uv run lefthook "$@"
57:     elif mise exec -- lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
58:     then
59:       mise exec -- lefthook "$@"
60:     elif devbox run lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
61:     then
62:       devbox run lefthook "$@"
63:     else
64:       echo "Can't find lefthook in PATH"
65:     fi
66:   fi
67: }
68: 
69: call_lefthook run "pre-commit" "$@"

(End of file - total 69 lines)
</content>

<content>1: #!/bin/sh
2: 
3: if [ "$LEFTHOOK_VERBOSE" = "1" -o "$LEFTHOOK_VERBOSE" = "true" ]; then

6:

11: call_lefthook()

13:   if test -n "$LEFTHOOK_BIN"

16:   elif lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
17:   then
18:     lefthook "$@"
19:   else
20:     dir="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"
21:     osArch=$(uname | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
22:     cpuArch=$(uname -m | sed 's/aarch64/arm64/;s/x86_64/x64/')
23:     if test -f "$dir/node_modules/lefthook-${osArch}-${cpuArch}/bin/lefthook"
24:     then
25:       "$dir/node_modules/lefthook-${osArch}-${cpuArch}/bin/lefthook" "$@"
26:     elif test -f "$dir/node_modules/@evilmartians/lefthook/bin/lefthook-${osArch}-${cpuArch}/lefthook"
27:     then
28:       "$dir/node_modules/@evilmartians/lefthook/bin/lefthook-${osArch}-${cpuArch}/lefthook" "$@"
29:     elif test -f "$dir/node_modules/@evilmartians/lefthook-installer/bin/lefthook"
30:     then
31:       "$dir/node_modules/@evilmartians/lefthook-installer/bin/lefthook" "$@"
32:     elif test -f "$dir/node_modules/lefthook/bin/index.js"
33:     then
34:       "$dir/node_modules/lefthook/bin/index.js" "$@"
35:     
36:     elif go tool lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
37:     then
38:       go tool lefthook "$@"
39:     elif bundle exec lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
40:     then
41:       bundle exec lefthook "$@"
42:     elif yarn lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
43:     then
44:       yarn lefthook "$@"
45:     elif pnpm lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
46:     then
47:       pnpm lefthook "$@"
48:     elif swift package lefthook >/dev/null 2>&1
49:     then
50:       swift package --build-path .build/lefthook --disable-sandbox lefthook "$@"
51:     elif command -v mint >/dev/null 2>&1

54:     elif uv run lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
55:     then

57:     elif mise exec -- lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
58:     then
59:       mise exec -- lefthook "$@"
60:     elif devbox run lefthook -h >/dev/null 2>&1
61:     then
62:       devbox run lefthook "$@"
63:     else
64:       echo "Can't find lefthook in PATH"
65:     fi
66:   fi
67: }
68: 
69: call_lefthook run "prepare-commit-msg" "$@"

2: 	"name": "opencode-relay",
3: 	"version": "0.1.0",
4: 	"type": "module",
5: 	"license": "MIT",
6: 	"description": "Web UI relay for OpenCode. Access your OpenCode sessions from any device.",
7: 	"bin": {
8: 		"opencode-relay": "dist/src/bin/cli.js"
9: 	},
10: 	"scripts": {
11: 		"dev": "tsx watch src/bin/cli.ts -- --foreground",
12: 		"dev:frontend": "vite",
13: 		"dev:dc": "./dc dev",
14: 		"dev:all": "trap 'kill 0' EXIT; tsx watch src/bin/cli.ts -- --foreground & vite & wait",
15: 		"build": "tsc && vite build",
16: 		"build:server": "tsc",
17: 		"build:frontend": "vite build",
18: 		"preview:frontend": "vite preview",
19: 		"preview:server": "pnpm build && node dist/src/bin/cli.js",
20: 		"check": "tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit --project src/lib/public/tsconfig.json",
21: 		"check:frontend": "tsc --noEmit --project src/lib/public/tsconfig.json",
22: 		"lint": "biome check .",
23: 		"lint:fix": "biome check --write .",
24: 		"test": "vitest run",
25: 		"test:unit": "vitest run test/unit",
26: 		"test:fixture": "vitest run test/fixture",
27: 		"test:pbt": "vitest run test/unit --grep 'property|PBT|fc\\.'",
28: 		"test:watch": "vitest",
29: 		"test:integration": "vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts",
30: 		"test:contract": "vitest run --config vitest.contract.config.ts",
31: 		"test:e2e": "pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.config.ts",
32: 		"test:e2e:ui": "pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.config.ts --ui",
33: 		"test:e2e:headed": "pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.config.ts --headed",
34: 		"test:e2e:debug": "pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright.config.ts --debug",
35: 		"test:visual": "pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-visual.config.ts",
36: 		"test:visual:update": "pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-visual.config.ts --update-snapshots",
37: 		"test:visual:headed": "pnpm build:frontend && npx playwright test --config test/e2e/playwright-visual.config.ts --headed",
38: 		"storybook": "storybook dev -p 6006",
39: 		"storybook:build": "storybook build -o dist/storybook",
40: 		"test:storybook-visual": "pnpm storybook:build && npx playwright test --config test/visual/playwright.config.ts",
41: 		"test:storybook-visual:update": "pnpm storybook:build && npx playwright test --config test/visual/playwright.config.ts --update-snapshots",
42: 		"test:all": "vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts",
43: 		"test:coverage": "vitest run --coverage",
44: 		"prepare": "lefthook install",
45: 		"docker": "./dc"
46: 	},
47: 	"dependencies": {
48: 		"@castlenine/svelte-qrcode": "^2.3.0",

<path>/Users/dstern/src/personal/opencode-relay/opencode-relay/vitest.config.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import { resolve } from "node:path";
2: import { defineConfig } from "vitest/config";
3: 
4: export default defineConfig({
5: 	plugins: [
6: 		{
7: 			name: "svelte-runes-mock",
8: 			enforce: "pre",
9: 			transform(code: string, id: string) {
10: 				// Only transform .svelte.ts files
11: 				if (!id.endsWith(".svelte.ts") && !id.endsWith(".svelte.js")) {
12: 					return null;
13: 				}
14: 				// Replace $state(x) with just x (creates plain objects)
15: 				// Replace $derived.by(fn) with ((fn) => fn())(fn) — IIFE wrapper that calls the function
16: 				// Replace $derived(expr) with expr
17: 				let transformed = code;
18: 				// $state<T>(x) or $state(x)
19: 				transformed = transformed.replace(/\$state(?:<[^>]+>)?\s*\(/g, "(");
20: 				// $derived.by(fn) → ((fn) => fn())(fn)
21: 				// Replace "$derived.by(" with "((fn) => fn())(" so the inner function gets called
22: 				transformed = transformed.replace(
23: 					/\$derived\.by\s*\(/g,
24: 					"((fn) => fn())(",
25: 				);
26: 				// $derived( -> (
27: 				transformed = transformed.replace(/\$derived\s*\(/g, "(");
28: 				return { code: transformed, map: null };
29: 			},
30: 		},
31: 	],
32: 	test: {
33: 		include: ["test/unit/**/*.test.ts", "test/fixture/**/*.test.ts"],
34: 		testTimeout: 10_000,
35: 		hookTimeout: 10_000,
36: 	},
37: 	resolve: {
38: 		alias: {
39: 			"@": resolve(__dirname, "src"),
40: 		},
41: 	},
42: });

(End of file - total 42 lines)
</content>
